mistral.notes: No visible differences observed between control and treated samples. All samples appear homogeneous with no signs of coagulation.
No visible differences observed between control and treated samples. CH19 and CH21 samples also show no visible differences.

perplexity.notes: All three samples are visually identical: same pale yellow semi-transparent plasma, no clots or fibrin, fully homogeneous with no coagulation advancement or unique features differentiating treatments

mistral.notes: No visible differences observed between control and treated samples. All samples appear homogeneous with no signs of coagulation.

perplexity.notes: No coagulation in any sample; differences limited to container (dish vs tubes) and presentation (1 vs 3 tubes); plasma color, transparency, homogeneity identical

mistral.notes: CH19 shows partial clot formation, while control and CH21 show no coagulation. Visible differences in clot presence and homogeneity.
CH19 shows more advanced coagulation compared to CH21. Both treated samples differ significantly from the control.

perplexity.notes: CH19 shows most advanced clotting (solid plaques) > CH21 (fibrin webs) > control (no clotting). Treated samples have wall-adhered white structures absent in control.

mistral.notes: CH19 shows early fibrin formation, while control and CH21 do not. CH19 is slightly heterogeneous due to fibrin strands.

perplexity.notes: All samples show no coagulation; differences limited to minor bubbles in control and subtle meniscus variations

mistral.notes: CH19 shows early fibrin formation, while control and CH21 show no coagulation. CH19 differs from CH21 in the presence of fibrin strands.

perplexity.notes: CH19 shows gelation and early fibrin vs. liquid states in control/CH21; CH21 closest to control

mistral.notes: CH21 shows the most advanced coagulation, followed by CH19. Control sample shows no coagulation.

perplexity.notes: CH19 shows early fibrin formation absent in control and CH21; treated samples differ in presentation (spread vs container); CH19 vs CH21 differentiated by fibrin presence

mistral.notes: CH19 shows early fibrin formation, unlike the control and CH21. CH21 and control are similar with no visible coagulation.

perplexity.notes: All samples show no coagulation; minor surface variation in CH19 only

mistral.notes: CH19 shows early fibrin formation, while control and CH21 show no coagulation. CH19 differs from CH21 in the presence of fibrin strands.

perplexity.notes: All at no coagulation; CH19 subtly more viscous than control, CH21 more fluid; no clots/fibrin in any.

mistral.notes: CH19 shows partial clotting, while control and CH21 show no coagulation. Visible differences in coagulation stages and morphological features.

perplexity.notes: CH19 shows unique white bottom layer absent in control/CH21; no coagulation in any sample; control and CH21 visually identical

mistral.notes: Control sample shows partial coagulation with a visible clot, while CH19 and CH21 show no coagulation and appear uniform.

perplexity.notes: Control shows clear partial clot absent in CH19/CH21; treated samples identical clear plasma; pronounced difference control vs. treated.
